name: Alex Kim
summary: Product-minded technologist with 9+ years of experience building software, leading cross-functional initiatives, and improving user outcomes across B2B and consumer products.

experience.description: Lead engineer for growth and onboarding surfaces used by small business customers.
impactEntries: Designed and shipped a progressive onboarding flow with role-based paths, analytics instrumentation, and experiment framework support; increased 30-day activation by 14%, reduced onboarding drop-off by 22% over 2 quarters (core onboarding used by ~120k new users/year).

Introduced query batching, Redis-backed read-through caching, and a new service-level performance budget with CI checks; reduced p95 latency by 61%, improved customer satisfaction by 9 points (served 40k daily active users across 3 regions).
highlights: Mentored 5 engineers and created a technical design review rubric adopted by two teams.
Partnered with design and PM to define quarterly roadmap for growth platform.

experience.description: Built platform capabilities for merchant checkout and internal tooling.
impactEntries: Led migration from monolith checkout endpoint to fault-isolated services with idempotent payment retries; reduced checkout failures by 35%, increased peak-hour conversion by 11% (merchant GMV surface of ~$180M/year).

Built a release health dashboard with deploy markers, error budgets, and customer-impact alerts; reduced MTTR by 42%, improved incident detection speed by 27% (used by engineering, product, and support organizations).
highlights: Ran weekly architecture sessions and authored internal standards for API versioning.
Capstone project on collaborative design tooling

skills.name: TypeScript
evidence: Used across Northstar Labs onboarding and internal platform services

skills.name: Product Analytics
evidence: Defined event taxonomy and experiment readouts for activation funnel

skills.name: User Research
evidence: Co-led moderated interviews for onboarding redesign

skills.name: Roadmapping
evidence: Owned quarterly planning for growth platform initiatives

skills.name: AWS
evidence: Managed production services across multi-region workloads

projects.name: FlowBoard
projects.description: Open-source workflow board for product and design collaboration.
impactEntries: Built real-time collaboration features and a plugin API for integrations; project gained 2.3k GitHub stars and 18 external contributors (used by startups and student teams in 20+ countries).
highlights: Wrote contributor guide and triage process that reduced issue response times.

significantItems.title: Speaker at React Summit
significantItems.summary: Presented on balancing product velocity with frontend platform quality.
significantItems.impact: Session was featured by organizers and reused in internal onboarding at two partner companies.

significantItems.title: Women in Tech Mentorship Program Lead
significantItems.summary: Organized a six-month mentorship cohort for early-career engineers and designers.
significantItems.impact: Improved retention and promotion readiness for participants.
